info.title: TMS Integrations Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Samsara TMS Integrations is the broadest transportation integration pattern in the catalog, covering two-way sync for addresses, drivers, assets, routes, messages, and forms, plus one-way GPS, telematics, and compliance data for execution visibility.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for TMS Integrations. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. The TMS integration guide publishes a concrete integration-point matrix. It documents two-way sync for addresses, drivers, vehicles, trailers, routes, messages, and forms through GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE style APIs, while also documenting one-way reads for GPS/telematics and compliance hours-of-service data. It further recommends combining polling, webhooks, and Kafka depending on entity type and update frequency, making this the most architecturally complete Samsara product record in the set.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
